name: skillz-agent-extension
description: VS Code shell for the skillz planner/worker agent runtime.

skillzAgent.provider.description: Provider passed to the skillz agent runtime. Use local for the localhost OpenAI-compatible bridge on port 5051, ollama-local for the localhost Ollama endpoint on port 11434, or ollama-runpod for the configured Runpod Ollama endpoint.

skillzAgent.model.description: Model passed to the skillz agent runtime.

skillzAgent.skillzPath.description: Optional skillz executable path for the backend process. If empty, the extension will try the repo .venv first and then skillz3/skillz.

skillzAgent.backendScript.description: Backend entry script to launch from the repo root. This is a user-level setting. Use main.py for the stable runtime or live_test_loop.py or main_v2.py for the beta TreeLoop planner bridge.
